name: Mandaar
overview: Power corrupts. And the pursuit of power devastates. As the battle for Geilpur reaches its peak, thirst for power overpowers human conscience in this tragic tale of greed, lust and prophecies!

trailers.title: Mandaar (মন্দার) | Official Trailer | World Classics | Anirban Bhattacharya | 19th Nov | hoichoi
